title: Cancer Registry Encounter Types Value Set Schema
description: JSON Schema for Cancer Registry Encounter Types Value Set ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions using IRI format.
narrative: This schema validates IRI-formatted codes for the Cancer Registry Encounter Types Value Set ValueSet. Each enum value includes the system URI in the format {systemuri}#{code} to match JSON-LD enumeration IRIs. Display values are available at https://dhis2.org/fhir/cancer-registry/ValueSet-cr-encounter-type-vs.displays.json. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
